changelog: FIXED: Mobile installed app no longer shows double splash on launch
Improved: Standalone/fullscreen mode skips in-page splash for faster open
NEW: Premium two-tier icon system (micro icon for small sizes, full brand icon for large sizes)
NEW: Rounded high-contrast PWA icon with improved readability and pop-out depth
NEW: Manifest icon mapping upgraded to PNG assets for broad device compatibility
Improved: Ultra-bold stroke design (240% thicker than original)
Improved: Sophisticated bronze center dot complements dark shadows
Enhanced: Deep black shadows create atmospheric depth
Enhanced: Logo subtle floating motion with shadow intensification
releaseNotes: Major enhancement to offline capabilities. Full portfolio now accessible without internet connection.
